zh.lifeSummary: John Harrop是Edward Harropp和?的兒子，於1526年出生在英國爾普雷斯特波利。他於1540年與Lady Agnes Turner在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾艾拉亞斯同結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭爾莫特拉姆 在 隆格登代爾住了大約21年。他去世於大約1602年在英國爾馬爾帕斯享年77歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾莫特拉姆 在 隆格登代爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Harrop是Edward Harropp和?的儿子，于1526年出生在英国爾普雷斯特波利。他于1540年与Lady Agnes Turner在英国英格兰斯塔福爾艾拉亞斯同结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰爾莫特拉姆 在 隆格登代爾住了大约21年。他去世于大约1602年在英国爾馬爾帕斯享年77岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾莫特拉姆 在 隆格登代爾。

nameMeanings.name: Harrop
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Harrop, Harrop Dale, Harrop Hall (Yorkshire), or Harehope (Northumberland), all of which may derive from Old English hara ‘hare’ + hop ‘small enclosed valley’.

variants.name: Harrup
meanings: Probably an altered form of German   Harruff  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: John Harrop was born in 1526, in Prestbury, Cheshire, England as the son of Edward Harropp and ?. He married Lady Agnes Turner in 1540, in Ellastone, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Mottram in Longdendale, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom for about 21 years. He died about 1602, in Malpas, Cheshire, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in Mottram in Longdendale, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Mottram in Longdendale, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni pendant environ 21 ans. ja.lifeSummary: John Harropは1526年にイギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーでEdward Harroppと?の息子として生まれた。1540年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアエラストーンでLady Agnes Turnerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアモットラム イン ロングデンダルに約21年間住んでいた。彼は約1602年にイギリスチェシュアイアマルプアスで77歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアモットラム イン ロングデンダルにて埋葬された。

ko.of Mottram in Longdendale, Cheshire, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모트램 인 론그데데일
ko., Mottram-in-Longdendale, Cheshire, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모트램 인 론그데데일
ko.lifeSummary: John Harrop(은)는 1526년 영국 체실르 프레스트버이에서 Edward Harropp(와)과 ?의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 엘라스톤에서 Lady Agnes Turner(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모트램 인 론그데데일에서 약 21년 동안 살았다. 그는 대략 1602년 영국 체실르 맬파스에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모트램 인 론그데데일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Harrop nasceu em 1526, em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra filho de Edward Harropp e ?. Ele casou-se com Lady Agnes Turner em 1540, em Ellastone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Mottram in Longdendale, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom por quase 21 anos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1602, em Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Mottram in Longdendale, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru., Mottram-in-Longdendale, Cheshire, Engl: моттрам ин лонгдендеил, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: John Harrop родился в 1526 г. в местности престбури, чешир, Англия. Его родителей звали Edward Harropp и ?. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Agnes Turner в 1540 г. в местности элластоун, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности моттрам ин лонгдендеил, чешир, Англия, Великобритания около 21 лет. Он умер около 1602 г. в местности малпас, чешир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности моттрам ин лонгдендеил, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
